title: AN ACT TO CONVERT SITIO PILI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DESPUJOLS, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, INTO A BARRIO WITH THE NAME OF DONA TRINIDAD ROXAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1894 / 49 OG No. 8, 3292 (August, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 936, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT TO CONVERT SITIO PILI IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DESPUJOLS, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, INTO A BARRIO WITH THE NAME OF DONA TRINIDAD ROXAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitio Pili in the municipality of Despujols, Province of Romblon, is hereby converted into a barrio with the name of Dona Trinidad Roxas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
